HGSS.521.0000:
Our city was featured on a
radio show.\f
It’s nice to hear praise for your
city, but it’s a bit embarrassing, too.
HGSS.521.0001:
I went to the Gym, raring for battles
against Trainers...\f
It turns out, I stumbled into the
unused Gym next door.\r
Boy, I was pretty embarrassed.
HGSS.521.0002:
This is the house of the Copycat girl.\f
She is so good at being a copycat
of the way people talk that it’ll\r
confuse you when you talk to her.
HGSS.521.0003:
The Copycat girl looked unhappy.\f
She said she lost her cherished
Poké Doll--CLEFAIRY.
HGSS.521.0004:
Going into an alley for the first time
makes me sorta anxious.
HGSS.521.0005:
Chomp... Chew...\f
The manager of the Power Plant
used to be a repairman in a\r
small factory.\f
Chew... Chew...\f
His hard work has taken him up the
ladder to eventually become the\r
manager of the Power Plant.\r
Chew... Gulp...\f
Quite impressive, don’t you think?
Haaah, I’m full!
HGSS.521.0006:
This is Silph Co., famous for
Pokémon merchandise.\f
In the past, Team Rocket wanted the
company because of that.
HGSS.521.0007:
There’s a place called Trainer House
in Viridian where Trainers gather from\r
all over the place.
HGSS.521.0008:
You came out from Johto?\f
You can zip back home by hopping on
the Magnet Train.
HGSS.521.0009:
Kanto-Johto Magnet Train Line
Saffron City Station
HGSS.521.0012:
Saffron City Pokémon Gym
Leader: Sabrina\r
The Mistress of Psychic-Type Pokémon!
HGSS.521.0014:
Don’t Call Me Uncle Psychic!
Mr. Psychic’s House
